description:
A recent site migration changed several URLs. Implement 301 (Permanent) redirects for the following four deprecated URLs to their new destinations to preserve SEO rankings:

- `/company-history/` to `/about-us/`
- `/services/legacy-support/` to `/services/`
- `/contact-us-2023/` to `/contact/`
- `/blog/news-updates/` to `/category/news/`

The redirects must return an HTTP 301 status code and the site homepage must remain functional. The WordPress admin is available in Firefox and the terminal is available for server configuration.
